title: Fix Explore follow/unfollow and start chat by using Principals from user search results

requirements.summary: Update Explore user search consumption to use each result's Principal and enable follow/unfollow with proper UI state, self-guard, optimistic refresh, and user-facing errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Explore search results include a reliable identifier for each user (Principal as text) that is used when invoking follow/unfollow mutations.
Follow/Unfollow buttons are enabled for other users (disabled only while the relevant mutation is in-flight).
After following or unfollowing a user, the Explore results update to reflect the new relationship state without requiring a full page refresh.
The current user cannot follow themselves (no follow button shown for the signed-in user).
Any follow/unfollow error from the backend is shown to the user in English (not only logged to console).

file_operations.description: Adjust the Explore search hook to return the backend search result shape (including each user's Principal) rather than a bare UserProfile list; update typing/imports accordingly so Explore can call follow/unfollow with the Principal text.

Replace the current disabled follow/unfollow workaround with real follow/unfollow actions using the searched user's Principal; hide actions for the signed-in user's own Principal; disable only the specific row's button while its mutation is in-flight; surface backend errors to the user in English (e.g., inline message in the page/row or toast) and ensure the list reflects new follow state after mutations via existing query invalidation.

requirements.summary: Enable Explore “Start chat” to start conversations using the searched user's Principal ID and navigate to the created thread with user-visible errors.
acceptanceCriteria: “Start chat” is enabled for other users and starts a conversation using the selected user’s Principal ID.
On success, the app navigates to the created conversation thread route.
On failure, an English error message is presented to the user.

file_operations.description: Enable “Start chat” per search result by calling startConversation with the selected user's Principal (as text), navigate to the existing chat thread route on success, and present a clear English error message on failure; ensure the button is hidden/disabled for the signed-in user's own Principal and only disables while the start-chat mutation is in-flight.

Ensure the startConversation mutation hook is compatible with being called from Explore using the searched user's Principal text, and that errors propagate so the Explore UI can display an English error message.
